entries.section: Leveling Tips for Feral Druid Tank in TBC Classic
entries.text: Make sure to gather up all of the quests associated with each leveling dungeon before you start running it. The experience gains from dungeon quests are enormous, and the full quest suite for a single dungeon can often net you a full level's worth of experience. You can find the full list of available quests for each dungeon in the dungeon's Wowhead strategy guide.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Feral Druid Tank in TBC Classic
entries.text: Try to form dungeon groups with other players who are interested in chain running the dungeon multiple times in a row. Unlike Outland dungeons, the leveling dungeons in Azeroth can take a very long time to reach, as they span the entirety of the Eastern Kingdoms and Kalimdor. As a result, it is extremely useful to find groups that will farm the same dungeon over and over in order to maximize the returns from the long travel time.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Feral Druid Tank in TBC Classic
entries.text: Take full advantage of the Druid's strength as a hybrid class capable of filling a tank, DPS, or healing role, as needed. By default, you will be tanking the majority of dungeon groups as a feral Druid, but you may periodically encounter a group that already has a Tank but is short a Healer or DPS player. In these situations, offer to fill the missing role, as you can perform every role easily during the early stages of the leveling process.
